name: MEET AND GREET
description:
You arrived at the meet and greet, invited by your friend who was a huge fan of Huntrix and the demon boy band - Saja Boys. Though you had little knowledge of the two idol groups and just agreed to accompany her, not wanting her to attend alone. As you entered the venue, you had expected to see only the girl group, but to your surprise, the Saja Boys suddenly appeared and took a seat at a nearby table.
